nodes.name: agent-manifest.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: YAML schema definition for Archon agent manifests, specifying required and optional fields, required files, and mandatory/optional sections for AGENT.md. Validates agent component structure for the registry.

nodes.name: bundle-manifest.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: YAML schema definition for Archon bundle manifests, specifying required and optional fields, required directory structure, optional structure, and validation rules for bundle components.

nodes.name: context-handoff.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: JSON Schema definition for context handoff documents used when passing session state between Archon agents across context windows. Defines required fields and properties for structured handoffs.

nodes.name: deviation-log.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: JSON Schema for deviation log entries created during the STOP-DOCUMENT-ASK-LOG deviation protocol, capturing when agents deviate from expected behavior.

nodes.name: guardrails.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: JSON Schema for Archon guardrails definitions embedded in agent manifests, specifying must-do and must-not rules with severity levels, on-violation strategies, and rule definitions.

nodes.name: hook-event.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: JSON Schema for hook event payloads passed to Claude Code hook scripts (session_boot, prompt_router, guard_bash, etc.), defining required fields and event properties.

nodes.name: mcp-catalog.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: YAML schema for the MCP integration catalog file, defining root-level fields and server entry structure for Archon's integration catalog system.

nodes.name: permission.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: JSON Schema for permission definitions used in Archon's Claude Code settings, specifying the structure of allowed/denied tool permissions.

nodes.name: pipeline.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: YAML schema for Archon pipeline definition files, specifying required fields (name, version, steps), optional fields (synapse-mode, config, state), and validation rules for pipeline YAML structure.

nodes.name: session.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: JSON Schema for Archon session state objects persisted to archon-state.json, defining required fields, session properties, and valid state transitions.

nodes.name: skill-manifest.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: YAML schema for Archon skill manifests (manifest.yaml), defining required and optional fields, required files (SKILL.md), optional directories (resources/), and mandatory/optional SKILL.md sections.

nodes.name: synapse-manifest.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: YAML schema for Archon synapse manifests, defining required and optional fields, required files (SYNAPSE.md), optional resource directories, and mandatory/optional SYNAPSE.md sections.

nodes.name: telemetry-envelope.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: JSON Schema for telemetry envelope objects used in Archon's telemetry and replay system, defining the structure for capturing and replaying session events.

nodes.name: thinking-trace.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: JSON Schema for sequential thinking trace objects produced by the sequential-thinking synapse, defining the structure for THINKING blocks captured as audit artifacts in pipelines.

nodes.name: tool-invocation.schema.yaml
nodes.summary: JSON Schema for tool invocation records captured during Archon sessions, defining the structure for tracking which tools were called with what inputs and outputs.
